notes: AD90 alumina ceramic — alternative materialId key. Same properties as ceramic_ad90. 90% Al2O3 by CoorsTek. RHAe ~1.8-2.2 per mm vs 7.62 AP per manufacturer data.

source.reference: CoorsTek AD90 technical datasheet, mirror of ceramic_ad90 entry
source.methodology: RHAe from CoorsTek published ballistic test data for AD90 vs 7.62mm AP. Duplicate key for alternative materialId lookup.
